content.text:
<user_query>
refactoring부터 진행하기 위해 golden master 확보하자
전체 확인한다음 전부 pass 아니면 중단하고 알려줘
</user_query>
Golden Master 검증: pytest tests/entity tests/control tests/boundary -v → 12 passed, exit 0. Report/13/Golden_Master_Baseline.md 저장. Refactor 착수 가능.

<user_query>
golden master 기반으로 safe refactoring 진행해줘
</user_query>

Phase: refactor | Golden Master 12/12. Safe refactor: length_unit (METERS_PER_* + _RatioBasedUnit), input_parser (_reject_invalid_format), output_formatter (OUTPUT_DECIMAL_PLACES). converter.py 미수정. 회귀 12 passed.

<user_query>
Report 폴더에 보고서 생성하고, Prompting 폴더에 Transcript도 Export 해줘.
</user_query>
